prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for PNC over the past year (ending 2024-05-23) were analyzed to estimate the average daily drift (mu) and daily volatility (sigma) of its logarithmic returns. The calculated daily drift (mu) was approximately 0.0001 (0.01%) and the daily volatility (sigma) was approximately 0.0126 (1.26%). The provided current price of $220.77 was used as the starting point (P_0), and '18 days' was interpreted as 18 trading days for the prediction horizon. The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution after 18 trading days. Confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of the log-price distribution, scaled by the square root of time (sqrt(18)) and corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level (approx. 0.674 for 50%, 1.282 for 80%, and 1.645 for 90%).
